THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENJI PACIFIC, LLC AKA MAI FRANCHISING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MH HOSPITALITY OF CA, LLC DBA THE MARKET HALL FKA MH HOSPITALITY OF CA, INC.
